title: Mode 7
description: A retro-style scanline perspective-rendering experiment built with Lua and LOVE2D, circa 2011.
description_html: A retro-style scanline perspective-rendering experiment built with Lua and LOVE2D circa 2011. Pseudo-3D floor rendering with rotation and scaling.
features: Mode 7 rendering — retro-style perspective transformation on a 2D plane
Rotation & scaling — real-time camera rotation and zoom
Tile-based maps — renders texture-mapped floor from a tile grid
Web build — plays in the browser via love.js (WASM)
